description: CompositionDark coral pink shirt made of 100% linen, with short sleeves that have rolled hem, patch pockets on the chest with embroidered brand name and lettering over left chest pocket in blue thread and with a full buttoned placketFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle Do not bleach Low iron Do not dry clean Low tumble dry Rinse thoroughly With summer here, there is no better way to keep your cool than by opting for a linen shirt in a vibrant hue from spykar. The deep coral pink infuses this shirt with energy and the fabric and short sleeves keep you feeling fresh all day.  Team this with chinos or white pants, brown leather thongs and a straw fedora for a total resort look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
